key_insight: TorchNEP makes training Neuroevolution Potentials far faster while improving accuracy, with the biggest gains coming from a two-stage training protocol.
engineering_relevance: It enables rapid, scalable development of machine-learned interatomic potentials for large atomistic simulations in materials discovery.
method: Analytically derived gradients with adaptive optimization
Two-stage training strategy for improved accuracy
evidence_signal: Across benchmark elemental and alloy datasets, TorchNEP consistently improved force and stress predictions and maintained comparable or better energy accuracy, while training became over 100× faster.
watch_item: Higher model complexity did not necessarily improve predictive performance, so lower training error should not be assumed to mean a better potential.
paper_title: TorchNEP: Ultra-Efficient and Accurate Training of Neuroevolution Potentials
